title: clematis tenuimarginata
intro: Clematis tenuimarginata, also known as the Chinese leather flower, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Clematis tenuimarginata include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, and reduce fever. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and consumed as a powder or capsule, although its use should be supervised by a medical professional.
